Fence contractor in Smyrna, TN

Trusted local professionals serving Smyrna and surrounding communities

Serving Smyrna, TN

The Fence Man is a leading provider of fence installation and repair services in Smyrna, Tennessee. Smyrna is a growing community with a mix of residential and commercial properties, requiring diverse fencing solutions. We offer a wide range of fence styles and materials to meet the needs of Smyrna residents and businesses. From privacy fences for homes to security fences for businesses, we can help you enhance your property's security and aesthetic appeal. We understand the importance of providing durable and long-lasting fences that can withstand Smyrna's climate. Our team is committed to providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship to ensure your complete satisfaction. We offer competitive pricing and flexible scheduling to accommodate your needs.

Smyrna's mix of residential and commercial properties benefits from a variety of fencing options, providing security and enhancing property values.

Wood Fence Installation

Classic wood fences expertly installed for privacy and beauty.

Durable and affordable chain link fences for security and containment.

Vinyl Fence Installation

Aluminum Fence Installation

Elegant and rust-proof aluminum fences for security and style.

Learn more →

Farm Fence Installation

Durable and reliable farm fences for livestock containment.

Learn more →

Fence Repair Services

Fast, reliable fence repair to restore your fence's integrity.
